item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-doc-exception-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately refused the fourth local exception paragraph, identified the repeated pattern from refund/exchange/gift to invoice, moved the issue upstream to the documentation structure and lack of a unified exception-boundary model, and proposed consolidation/deletion plus a structural rewrite. The included draft is a unified section/table rather than a direct standalone invoice patch, so the fail signal is not observed."}
